title: Demo 4: dame loop capture with extra central branching.
description:
Demo 4: dame loop capture with extra central branching.

Same ring as Demo 3, but with an extra black pion on D5 in the centre.
The central piece creates genuine branches: some sequences capture only the
outer ring and end on E8, while others weave through D5 and end elsewhere.

  Outer ring loop (ends E8):
    E8 -> F7 -> G6 -> F5 -> E4 -> D3 -> C2 -> B3 -> A4 -> B5 -> C6 -> D7 -> E8

In the REPL, try:
  > e8 e8
The app lists the matching routes. Choose one with:
  > e8 e8 1
  > e8 e8 2
